hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'src/pages/.*\.tsx$' && echo "$f" | grep -qv 'main\.tsx' && echo '{"systemMessage": "REMINDER: New page created at '"$f"'. You MUST now: (1) add an import to src/pages/main.tsx, (2) add a <Route> entry in the <Routes> block of src/pages/main.tsx, then run npm run build to verify."}' || true; } 2>/dev/null || true
